arts.ttl: Jake Richards has 'best game for Exeter City' as teen stars
arts.sum: Saturday’s outing was the first time the self-confessed City fan had played outside the EFL Trophy this season, but manager Gary Caldwell said that performances in training as well as the U21 Premier League Cup games he has featured in meant he deserved his chance. The 17-year-old made his first appearance for City this season outside of the EFL Trophy and didn’t look at all out of place in the 2-0 FA Cup win over Chesterfield.

arts.ttl: FA Cup third round draw LIVE: Updates as Liverpool, Manchester United and Premier League sides learn fate
arts.sum: A total of 64 sides will found out their opponents for the next round, with all Championship and Premier League sides entering the draw
